en: Continue
zh: 继续

en: Luck
zh: 幸运

en: Charm
zh: 魅力

en: Strength
zh: 力量

en: Constitution
zh: 体质

en: Intelligence
zh: 智力

en: Stranded Trader
zh: 困在荒野的商人

en: A merchant's rig sits dead in the cracked salt-flat, one wheel buried. He squints at you over a dust-caked scarf, hand never far from his holster.
zh: 一辆商队车死在龟裂的盐碱地上，一只轮子陷进沙里。他从蒙尘的围巾上方眯眼打量你，手始终没离开枪套。

en: Help dig the rig free (he pays you +40 gold)
zh: 帮他把车挖出来（他付你 +40 金币）

en: Hours of shoveling later the rig lurches loose. He counts forty into your palm and rolls off into the haze.
zh: 铲了几个钟头，车终于猛地松脱。他数了四十枚塞进你掌心，碾着尘雾扬长而去。

en: [Charm 5] Sweet-talk a parting gift from his crate
zh: [魅力 5] 甜言蜜语，从他的货箱里讨件临别礼

en: Your easy smile wins him over. He digs out a Lucky Cog and presses it into your hand for the company.
zh: 你随和的笑容打动了他。他翻出一枚幸运齿轮，塞进你手里，谢你一路作伴。

en: [Luck] Roll his weighted dice for the strongbox
zh: [幸运] 用他灌了铅的骰子赌那只保险箱

en: The bones come up sevens. He grumbles and tosses you the core from the strongbox.
zh: 骰子掷出七点。他嘟囔着，把保险箱里的核心抛给你。

en: Snake eyes. He laughs, draws iron, and clips your shoulder before you back off.
zh: 两个一点。他大笑，拔枪，在你退开前擦伤了你的肩膀。

en: Buried Cache
zh: 埋藏的暗格

en: A rusted hatch juts from the dune, half-swallowed by sand. Old militia markings warn of a sealed supply vault beneath. The lock looks ready to give.
zh: 一扇锈蚀的舱盖从沙丘里探出，半埋在沙中。旧民兵的标记警告下方封着一座补给库。那把锁看起来快撑不住了。

en: Pry it open and grab the gear
zh: 撬开它，把装备拿走

en: The hatch shrieks open. Inside, vacuum-sealed and waiting, sits a piece of pre-collapse equipment.
zh: 舱盖刺耳地弹开。里头真空封存着一件大崩溃前的装备，静静等着。

en: [Luck] Trust the rotting floor and dive deep
zh: [幸运] 赌那腐朽的地板，深入下去

en: The boards hold. In the deepest locker you find a rare relic of the old world and a cache of coin.
zh: 木板撑住了。在最深处的储物柜里，你找到一件旧世界的稀有遗物，还有一小笔藏起来的钱。

en: The floor caves. You crash through onto twisted rebar and crawl out empty-handed and bleeding.
zh: 地板塌了。你摔在扭曲的钢筋上，空着手、淌着血爬了出来。

en: The Hooded Stranger
zh: 兜帽下的陌生人

en: By a guttering fire sits a figure swathed in grey rags, face lost in shadow. A cracked deck of fortune cards waits face-down on a flat stone between you.
zh: 将熄的篝火旁坐着一个裹着灰布的身影，脸隐在阴影里。你们之间的一块平石上，扣着一副残破的命运卡。

en: Share your rations and your story
zh: 分享你的口粮和你的故事

en: The stranger listens, mends your wounds with a salve, and something in the telling leaves you steadier with people.
zh: 陌生人静静听着，用药膏替你敷好伤口；讲述之间，你与人相处也多了几分从容。

en: [Charm 5] Read the future in their cards
zh: [魅力 5] 请他用卡牌为你卜算未来

en: They deal three cards, nod slowly, and trace your fortune. You leave feeling the dice will fall your way.
zh: 他发出三张牌，缓缓点头，为你描出命数。你离开时，只觉骰子都会向着你落。

en: [Luck] Cut the deck and take what fate gives
zh: [幸运] 切牌，听凭命运给什么就拿什么

en: You turn the Sun. The stranger gifts you a keen Scavenger Lens and vanishes into the dark.
zh: 你翻出『太阳』。陌生人赠你一具精良的拾荒者透镜，随即没入黑暗。

en: You turn the Tower. A cold dread bleeds your vigor, though a few coins spill from the deck as consolation.
zh: 你翻出『高塔』。一阵彻骨的不安抽走你的精气，所幸牌堆里散落几枚硬币，权当安慰。

en: Rad Storm
zh: 辐射风暴

en: The sky bruises green and a screaming wind drives glowing dust toward you. There is no outrunning it — only a choice of how to weather the surge.
zh: 天空泛起淤青般的绿，呼啸的狂风卷着发光的尘埃扑面而来。你跑不赢它——只能选择如何熬过这阵浪潮。

en: Hunker down and ride it out (lose 4 HP)
zh: 蜷下身子硬扛过去（失去 4 点生命）

en: You wrap up tight and breathe through your scarf. The storm flays your skin raw but passes you by.
zh: 你裹紧自己，隔着围巾呼吸。风暴把你的皮肤刮得生疼，但终究放过了你。

en: [Charm 5] Wave down a passing convoy for shelter
zh: [魅力 5] 拦下过路的车队求个庇护

en: Your frantic charm earns a wave back. They haul you into a sealed truck, patch you up, and slip you some coin for the road.
zh: 你拼命挥手、巧言相求，换来对方回应。他们把你拽进密封货车，替你包扎，还塞给你些路费。

en: [Luck] Sprint through the glow toward a bunker
zh: [幸运] 冲过辉光，奔向一座地堡

en: You thread the worst of it and slam the bunker hatch. Inside, an intact core hums in the dark — and you feel charmed.
zh: 你穿过最凶的一段，砰地关上地堡舱门。黑暗里，一枚完好的核心嗡嗡作响——你只觉时运在身。

en: The storm catches you in the open. You reach the bunker scorched and retching, the dose still burning in your lungs.
zh: 风暴在旷野里逮住了你。你抵达地堡时焦灼欲呕，那股辐射还在肺里灼烧。
